title: Kernel bootstrap for this Codex session. Read and execute the repository-authoritative prompt at: /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md Run id: adhoc:Mac:kernel-workspace:39719:run:20260404T200602:65205 Bootstrap receipt path: /Users/masayuki/.config/kernel/bootstrap...
summary_text: **Minimal Sketch** 1. Add one local-linked `knowledge` adapter entry in [config/integrations/local-systems.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/config/integrations/local-systems.json#L32) and [config/integrations/peripheral-adapters.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/config/integrations/peripheral-adapters.json#L32), modeled on `obsidian-audio-ai`, with `authority: artifact-only`, `validation_mode: smoke`, and a single `path` into a markdown vault. 2. Make the adapter write only markdown notes plus a small sidecar receipt path under the run workspace, so Kernel only sees file paths, not note bodies. That stays aligned with [docs/kernel/requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel/requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md#L120) and [docs/kernel/interfaces/schema-v1.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel/interfaces/schema-v1.md#L94). 3. Register the emitted note path in `phase_artifacts` or `context_reference` via [scripts/lib/kernel-compact-artifact.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-compact-artifact.sh#L412), then let [scripts/lib/kernel-phase-gate.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-phase-gate.sh#L207) enforce presence and grounding when that path is required. 4. Use [scripts/lib/kernel-memory-query.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-memory-query.sh#L21) as the only Kernel-side retrieval index at first, so the knowledge layer is searchable without creating a new backend. **Non-Goals** - No vector database or embedding service. - No new control plane or scheduler. - No inline note bodies inside compact artifacts. - No direct provider-to-provider content sync. - No replacement of `phase-gate` with a knowledge-system-specific validator. - No cross-repo sync, sharing, or replication until the local markdown flow is stable. This keeps the layer markdown-first, path-based, and fully inside the current FUGUE/kernel boundary.
